creator: trashcan@ellael.org
text:
(In reply to Michael Grimm from comment #11)

After adding dovecot-pigeonhole to PACKAGE_FETCH_BLACKLIST I do now get:

[stable-default] Fetching wordpress-6.4.4,1.pkg: .......... done
[00:03:03] Package fetch: Using cached copy of wordpress-6.4.4,1
[00:03:07] Deleting wordpress-6.4.4,1.pkg: missing dependency: php82-curl-8.2.22
[00:03:08] Error: /usr/local/share/poudriere/bulk.sh:download_from_repo_post_delete:20:download_from_repo_post_delete: We lost fetched unversioned wordpress-6.4.4,1.pkg
